items.title: Man United's Martinez sent off in loss to Leeds
items.summary: Noah Okafor wrote himself into club folklore by scoring an Old Trafford brace that saw Leeds United celebrate a first Premier League win against Manchester United in over 23 years.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: ‘Carelessly squandered’: Wisden scolds England’s tumultuous Ashes tour

items.title: Ranking the Top 20 Players in the Men's College Basketball Transfer Portal
items.summary: The NCAA men's college basketball transfer portal is officially open. Here are the top 20 players who have entered.
